data.name: Properties_Subtitle
data.value: Portfolio view first, execution detail second. Open each property profile only when the team needs the full operating context.

data.name: Properties_SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by name, address, city, postal code or type

data.name: Units_Subtitle
data.value: Keep the unit portfolio scannable. Edit quickly here and use each property profile for the full asset story.

data.name: Units_SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by unit, property, layout or status

data.name: Units_NoRecordsTitle
data.value: No units match the current filters.

data.name: Units_NoRecordsSubtitle
data.value: Reset the filters or add a new unit to complete the operating picture.

data.name: Units_DrawerSubtitle
data.value: Keep unit operations light here. Use the property profile when the team needs the broader asset story.

data.name: Units_GuidanceSelectProperty
data.value: Attach the unit to a property first so leases, turnover and profile views stay connected.

data.name: Units_GuidanceOccupied
data.value: This unit is marked occupied. Use the leases module to keep contract dates and Ontario paperwork in sync.

data.name: Units_GuidanceVacant
data.value: This unit is marked vacant. Keep rent current and use the property profile to align the leasing story before marketing.

data.name: Leases_Subtitle
data.value: Review lease coverage from one table, then open the matching property profile when the team needs deeper execution detail.

data.name: Leases_SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by unit, tenant, status or Ontario workflow

data.name: Leases_NoRecordsTitle
data.value: No leases match the current filters.

data.name: Leases_NoRecordsSubtitle
data.value: Reset the filters or add a lease to restore portfolio coverage.

data.name: Leases_DrawerSubtitle
data.value: Keep contract updates compact here and open the related property profile when operations need the full picture.

data.name: Leases_GuidanceLinkUnitAndTenant
data.value: Link the lease to both a unit and a tenant so the portfolio, audit and property profile views stay aligned.

data.name: Leases_GuidanceMissingJurisdictionLease
data.value: Jurisdiction lease is marked missing. Use the property profile and compliance workflow to close that gap before move-in activity continues.

data.name: Leases_GuidanceScheduled
data.value: The notice workflow is already scheduled. Keep dates, service and profile context aligned for the operating team.

data.name: Leases_GuidanceReady
data.value: Lease is connected and ready. Schedule the notice workflow only when the timing is appropriate for this unit and resident.

data.name: Tenants_Subtitle
data.value: Keep resident information easy to scan here and use the lease or property pages when the team needs contract or asset context.

data.name: Tenants_SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by name, email, phone or provider

data.name: Tenants_NoRecordsTitle
data.value: No tenants match the current filters.

data.name: Tenants_NoRecordsSubtitle
data.value: Reset the filters or add a tenant to restore resident coverage.

data.name: Tenants_DrawerSubtitle
data.value: Capture the resident basics here. Use leases for contract timing and properties for asset-specific execution.

data.name: Tenants_NarrativeStrong
data.value: Strong screening profile and low-friction follow-up candidate.

data.name: Tenants_NarrativeSolid
data.value: Solid screening baseline; keep documentation organized for lease execution.

data.name: Tenants_NarrativeNeedsReview
data.value: Needs closer review and a tighter follow-up checklist before finalizing the resident path.

data.name: Tenants_GuidanceScreeningIncomplete
data.value: Screening is marked incomplete. Keep the resident in review until supporting documents and provider checks are finalized.

data.name: Tenants_GuidanceStrongProfile
data.value: This resident profile looks strong. Use the leases page to keep dates and Ontario paperwork moving cleanly.

data.name: Tenants_GuidanceCoordinateLeaseSteps
data.value: Capture the essentials here, then coordinate lease steps carefully so documentation and follow-up stay consistent.

data.name: Maintenance_Subtitle
data.value: Keep operational requests visible in one table and open the property profile only when the team needs the deeper asset context.

data.name: Maintenance_SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by title, vendor, property or status

data.name: Maintenance_NoRecordsTitle
data.value: No maintenance requests match the current filters.

data.name: Maintenance_NoRecordsSubtitle
data.value: Reset the filters or add a request to restore operational visibility.

data.name: Maintenance_DrawerSubtitle
data.value: Capture the ticket here, then use the linked property profile when the team needs the broader operating timeline.

data.name: Maintenance_GuidanceAttachProperty
data.value: Attach the request to a property first so the operating team can trace the issue inside the asset profile.

data.name: Maintenance_GuidanceEmergency
data.value: Emergency ticket: keep vendor handoff, timeline and resident communication tight from the first update.

data.name: Maintenance_GuidanceDefault
data.value: Use this form for the essentials, then rely on the property profile to coordinate broader operational follow-up.

data.name: Compliance_Subtitle
data.value: Keep reminder workflows scannable here and open the linked templates only when the team needs the full legal document package.

data.name: Compliance_SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by title, notice or reference

data.name: Compliance_PageSubtitle
data.value: Keep {0} reminder workflows scannable here and open the linked templates only when the team needs the full legal document package.

data.name: Compliance_NoRecordsTitle
data.value: No compliance reminders match the current filters.

data.name: Compliance_NoRecordsSubtitle
data.value: Reset the filters to bring the {0} workflow backlog back into view.

data.name: Compliance_NarrativeCompleted
data.value: Workflow completed and available for audit reference.

data.name: Compliance_NarrativeDueSoon
data.value: Time-sensitive jurisdiction action; keep service dates and supporting evidence tight.

data.name: Compliance_NarrativeOpen
data.value: Open reminder in the active jurisdiction workflow queue.

data.name: Properties_NoRecordsTitle
data.value: No properties match the current filters.

data.name: Properties_NoRecordsSubtitle
data.value: Reset the filters or add a new address to keep growing the portfolio.

data.name: Properties_DrawerSubtitle
data.value: Capture only what the team needs now. Full execution lives in the property profile.

data.name: Properties_MarketNarrative_Student
data.value: In {0}, emphasize speed, predictability and recurring seasonal readiness to win in the student segment.

data.name: Properties_MarketNarrative_Family
data.value: In {0}, stability, storage, schools and resident experience should anchor the property story for family-oriented renters.

data.name: Properties_MarketNarrative_Premium
data.value: In {0}, lead with finish quality, convenience and a polished leasing journey to support stronger pricing confidence.

data.name: Properties_MarketNarrative_Core
data.value: In {0}, combine practical amenities, commuter convenience and disciplined follow-up to strengthen leasing conversion.

data.name: Properties_AmenitySummary_EssentialUrbanLiving
data.value: Laundry access, secure entry, practical storage and daily convenience features that support reliable city living.

data.name: Properties_AmenitySummary_LifestyleDrivenPremium
data.value: Fitness, outdoor amenity space, upgraded finishes and convenience features that justify a stronger rent story.

data.name: Properties_AmenitySummary_FamilyConvenience
data.value: Parking, storage, durable layouts and practical amenities that make longer-stay household living easier.

data.name: Properties_AmenitySummary_StudentPracticalNeeds
data.value: Transit access, shared study-friendly layouts, durable finishes and simple move-in convenience for recurring turnovers.

data.name: Properties_NeighborhoodNotes_TransitLedUrbanAppeal
data.value: Strong appeal for renters seeking quick access to transit, daily retail and a smooth commute around {0}.

data.name: Properties_NeighborhoodNotes_FamilyOrientedNeighbourhood
data.value: Position around stability, schools, parks and daily convenience for households evaluating longer stays in {0}.

data.name: Properties_NeighborhoodNotes_StudentConvenienceCorridor
data.value: Best marketed around campus access, transit simplicity and predictable day-to-day convenience for students and guarantors.

data.name: Properties_NeighborhoodNotes_WaterfrontLifestyle
data.value: Lead with walkability, views, recreation access and lifestyle differentiation that strengthens emotional renter interest.

data.name: Properties_NeighborhoodNotes_ValueRepositioningPocket
data.value: Useful for renters trading a prime core address for more space, better value and practical commuting from this {0} pocket.

data.name: Properties_LeasingNotes_PremiumProfessionalPositioning
data.value: Lead with finish quality, low-friction commuting and a polished move-in experience for professionals and couples.

data.name: Properties_LeasingNotes_FastVacancyRecovery
data.value: Simplify the story, keep pricing sharp and run a tighter follow-up cadence to compress vacancy days without diluting quality.

data.name: Properties_LeasingNotes_LongStayHouseholdRetention
data.value: Emphasize stability, practical layout value and resident experience to attract lower-turnover households.

data.name: Properties_LeasingNotes_StudentTurnoverCadence
data.value: Prepare for seasonal peaks, standardize showings and keep documentation and move-in workflows fast for recurring cycles.

data.name: Properties_LeasingNotes_RenovationLedRentLift
data.value: Use upgraded finishes and clearer before/after positioning to support pricing confidence and stronger listing conversion.

data.name: Properties_OperationalNotes_TurnoverSpeed
data.value: Pre-book vendors, standardize refresh scope and reduce idle time between notice, maintenance and marketing launch.

data.name: Properties_OperationalNotes_VendorCoordination
data.value: Keep vendor expectations, access steps and closeout communication tight so the team can move from issue to completion faster.

data.name: Properties_OperationalNotes_PreventiveMaintenance
data.value: Prioritize recurring checks and small interventions early to prevent avoidable resident disruption and revenue leakage.

data.name: Properties_OperationalNotes_ResidentExperience
data.value: Maintain clear communication, dependable service timing and cleaner handoffs to strengthen renewals and referrals.

data.name: Properties_OperationalNotes_ComplianceHeavyOperations
data.value: Track Ontario notice windows, safety checks and documentation discipline so compliance work stays visible and repeatable.

data.name: PropertyProfile_NoUnitsYet
data.value: No units added yet for this property.

data.name: PropertyProfile_LeasingPlaybookFallback
data.value: Record who rents here best, pricing cues and showing narrative.

data.name: PropertyProfile_NoLeasesLinked
data.value: No leases currently linked to this property.

data.name: PropertyProfile_OperationalNotesFallback
data.value: Store turnover, vendor and operational watchouts for the team.

data.name: PropertyProfile_AmenitiesFallback
data.value: Capture building amenities to arm leasing and showing conversations.

data.name: PropertyProfile_NoMaintenanceLinked
data.value: No maintenance items currently linked to this property.

data.name: PropertyProfile_ComplianceReminderBody
data.value: Use this property profile to coordinate Ontario notices, unit turnover documentation and leasing readiness from one place.

data.name: PropertyProfile_ChecklistItem1
data.value: Verify Ontario lease package is current for new move-ins

data.name: PropertyProfile_ChecklistItem2
data.value: Track notice service dates and supporting audit trail

data.name: PropertyProfile_ChecklistItem3
data.value: Review turnover documentation before relisting any vacant unit

data.name: PropertyProfile_NoComplianceReminders
data.value: No compliance reminders are currently available.

data.name: PropertyProfile_ReadinessSummary_High
data.value: This property is well documented and ready for consistent leasing execution.

data.name: PropertyProfile_ReadinessSummary_Mid
data.value: Good baseline, but more positioning detail would improve leasing consistency.

data.name: PropertyProfile_ReadinessSummary_Low
data.value: High upside: complete the playbook fields to strengthen leasing quality and team execution.

data.name: PropertyProfile_IdealRenterProfile_Student
data.value: Best positioned for students and parents prioritizing predictable operations, transit and nearby amenities.

data.name: PropertyProfile_IdealRenterProfile_Family
data.value: Strong fit for longer-stay households looking for neighbourhood stability, storage and practical daily living.

data.name: PropertyProfile_IdealRenterProfile_Default
data.value: Best suited for professionals and couples who value location quality, polished leasing presentation and smooth move-in execution.

data.name: PropertyProfile_Headline_Student
data.value: Student-ready living in {0} with practical convenience and fast move-in support.

data.name: PropertyProfile_Headline_Family
data.value: Stable family-oriented rental in {0} with practical space and everyday convenience.

data.name: PropertyProfile_Headline_Premium
data.value: Premium {0} living in {1} with polished presentation and strong renter appeal.

data.name: PropertyProfile_Headline_Default
data.value: Well-positioned {0} rental in {1} with commuter-friendly appeal and disciplined operations.

data.name: PropertyProfile_AssetStageNarrative_Setup
data.value: The asset structure is not fully mapped yet. Finish the base setup before relying on portfolio insights.

data.name: PropertyProfile_AssetStageNarrative_LeaseUp
data.value: This address needs focused vacancy execution, pricing discipline and sharper listing follow-through.

data.name: PropertyProfile_AssetStageNarrative_StabilizePlaybook
data.value: Occupancy is workable, but the commercial playbook still needs stronger documentation for repeatable team execution.

data.name: PropertyProfile_AssetStageNarrative_Stabilized
data.value: The property is documented and operationally steady enough to serve as a benchmark asset in the portfolio.

data.name: PropertyProfile_PricingPosture_Vacant
data.value: Protect revenue recovery first. Benchmark against the target of {0}, tighten showing speed and avoid overpricing vacant suites.

data.name: PropertyProfile_PricingPosture_AboveTarget
data.value: This asset is outperforming target. Preserve pricing discipline and document why this positioning resonates with renters.

data.name: PropertyProfile_PricingPosture_BelowTarget
data.value: Revenue sits below target. Review unit mix, renewal strategy and whether the property story supports the desired price point.

data.name: PropertyProfile_PricingPosture_OnTarget
data.value: Revenue is on target. Focus on keeping renewals smooth and protecting turnover quality rather than chasing avoidable concessions.

data.name: PropertyProfile_OperationsFocus_Vacant
data.value: Keep turnover speed high, align vendors early and remove friction between vacancy, maintenance and leasing handoff.

data.name: PropertyProfile_OperationsFocus_Default
data.value: Add repeatable operating notes so onsite staff and external vendors execute the asset the same way every time.

data.name: PropertyProfile_Action_AddUnitMix
data.value: Add the unit mix so occupancy, rent roll and leasing performance become measurable.

data.name: PropertyProfile_Action_VacancyRecovery
data.value: Launch a vacancy recovery sprint with sharper pricing, faster showings and tighter follow-up.

data.name: PropertyProfile_Action_CompletePlaybook
data.value: Complete the missing playbook inputs to improve consistency across listings, tours and renewals.

data.name: PropertyProfile_Action_ReviewPricing
data.value: Review the pricing story and positioning against the revenue target before offering concessions.

data.name: PropertyProfile_Action_DocumentBenchmark
data.value: Document what is working here and reuse this property as the benchmark playbook for similar assets.

data.name: PropertyProfile_Action_StayAhead
data.value: Stay ahead of renewals and maintenance windows to protect the current stabilized performance.
